title: willdenowia pilleata
intro: Willdenowia pilleata, also known as the needle fern, is a species of flowering plant in the lycopodiopsida family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Willdenowia pilleata include the potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of Willdenowia pilleata may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
